100% Deposit Match Bonus
Rules
The wager of 30X is required in order to collect the bonus.
In-House games have a coefficient of 0.2.
Only betting in certain games will be counted towards the required wager.
Only bets between $0.1 USD and $10 USD will be counted towards the required wager.
Only bets in the bonus currency will be counted towards the required wager.
Additional deposits can be made in order to reach the required wager.
Once the required wager is reached, the bonus will be available for collection.
If the required wager is not reached before expiration time or if the bonus is not collected before expiration time, the bonus will be lost.
